# Story 5.1: Suggestion Storage and Suppression Algorithm

Status: ready-for-dev

## Story

As a developer,
I want to store suggestions and track user feedback to suppress irrelevant suggestions,
So that the AI learns from user behavior and improves suggestion relevance over time.

## Acceptance Criteria

**Given** the suggestions table from Epic 1
**When** a suggestion is generated by SuggestionEngine
**Then** it's stored with suggestedAt timestamp
**And** when user taps "Block it", acceptedAt is set and suppressedUntil = now + 1 day (UX-DR26)
**And** when user taps "Not now", dismissedAt is set and suppressedUntil = now + 3 days (UX-DR26)
**And** when user taps thumbs-down, thumbsDownAt is set and suppressedUntil = now + 7 days (UX-DR26)
**And** SuggestionEngine filters out any skill where suppressedUntil > now()
**And** the suppression logic is the entire learning algorithm

## Tasks / Subtasks

- [ ] Task 1: Create Suggestion Domain Model (AC: 1)
  - [ ] Define Suggestion entity with all required fields
  - [ ] Create SuggestionRepository interface
  - [ ] Add suppression status methods

- [ ] Task 2: Implement Suggestion Data Layer (AC: 2)
  - [ ] Create SuggestionDAO with Drift queries
  - [ ] Implement SuggestionRepository concrete class
  - [ ] Add CRUD operations for suggestions

- [ ] Task 3: Implement Suppression Algorithm (AC: 3-6)
  - [ ] Create SuppressionService with three-tier logic
  - [ ] Implement suppression window calculations
  - [ ] Add suppressed skill filtering methods
  - [ ] Create suggestion feedback recording methods

- [ ] Task 4: Add Suggestion State Management (AC: 7)
  - [ ] Create Riverpod providers for suggestion operations
  - [ ] Add suggestion history provider
  - [ ] Implement suppressed skills provider

## Dev Notes

### Critical Architecture Requirements

**Database Schema (from Architecture):**
- The `suggestions` table is foundational - get this right before any feature code
- `suppressed_until` column is the entire learning algorithm in one column
- Must support efficient querying for suppression filtering

**Suppression Algorithm (from Architecture Decision #2):**
```dart
const suppressionDismissed   = Duration(days: 3);  // "not now" — try again in 3 days
const suppressionThumbsDown  = Duration(days: 7);  // "wrong skill" — avoid for a week
const suppressionAccepted    = Duration(days: 1);  // just scheduled — don't suggest again tomorrow
```

**Key Implementation Pattern:**
- SuggestionEngine filters out any skill where `suppressed_until > now()`
- This is the entire learning algorithm - no ML, no complex logic
- Three different suppression windows based on user feedback type

### Project Structure Notes

**File Locations (from Architecture):**
```
lib/features/ai/
├── data/
│   ├── suggestion_dao.dart          # Drift DAO for suggestions table
│   └── suggestion_repository.dart   # implements domain interface
├── domain/
│   ├── suggestion.dart              # entity (plain Dart class)
│   ├── suggestion_repository.dart   # abstract interface
│   └── suppression_service.dart     # business logic for suppression
└── presentation/
    └── ai_providers.dart            # Riverpod providers (update existing)
```

**Database Integration:**
- Extends existing `core/database/app_database.dart`
- Must integrate with existing Drift schema from Epic 1
- Use snake_case columns, Drift generates camelCase Dart

### Technical Requirements

**Drift Table Definition:**
```dart
class Suggestions extends Table {
  IntColumn get id => integer().autoIncrement()();
  IntColumn get skillId => integer().references(Skills, #id)();
  DateTimeColumn get slotStart => dateTime()();
  IntColumn get slotDuration => integer()(); // minutes
  DateTimeColumn get suggestedAt => dateTime()();
  DateTimeColumn get acceptedAt => dateTime().nullable()();
  DateTimeColumn get dismissedAt => dateTime().nullable()();
  DateTimeColumn get thumbsDownAt => dateTime().nullable()();
  DateTimeColumn get suppressedUntil => dateTime().nullable()();
}
```

**Critical Query for SuggestionEngine:**
```dart
// Filter out suppressed skills
Future<List<int>> getNonSuppressedSkillIds() async {
  final query = select(suggestions)
    ..where((s) => s.suppressedUntil.isNull() | s.suppressedUntil.isSmallerThanValue(DateTime.now()));
  return query.map((s) => s.skillId).get();
}
```

**Suppression Logic Implementation:**
```dart
Future<void> recordFeedback(int suggestionId, FeedbackType type) async {
  final now = DateTime.now();
  final suppressedUntil = switch (type) {
    FeedbackType.accepted => now.add(suppressionAccepted),
    FeedbackType.dismissed => now.add(suppressionDismissed), 
    FeedbackType.thumbsDown => now.add(suppressionThumbsDown),
  };
  
  await (update(suggestions)..where((s) => s.id.equals(suggestionId)))
    .write(SuggestionsCompanion(
      acceptedAt: type == FeedbackType.accepted ? Value(now) : const Value.absent(),
      dismissedAt: type == FeedbackType.dismissed ? Value(now) : const Value.absent(),
      thumbsDownAt: type == FeedbackType.thumbsDown ? Value(now) : const Value.absent(),
      suppressedUntil: Value(suppressedUntil),
    ));
}
```

### Error Handling Requirements

**From Architecture Pattern #3:**
- Use `Result<T, AppError>` for service operations that can fail
- Use `AsyncValue<T>` at UI boundaries (Riverpod providers)
- Plain `try/catch` only around Drift database calls

**AppError Cases:**
```dart
enum AppError {
  suggestionSuppressed,    // skill is currently suppressed
  databaseWriteFailed,     // suggestion storage failed
  invalidSuggestionId,     // suggestion ID not found
}
```

### Testing Requirements

**Unit Tests (Priority 1):**
- `SuppressionService` - pure logic, no Flutter dependency
- Suppression window calculations
- Suppression filtering logic
- Feedback recording logic

**Integration Tests:**
- Suggestion CRUD operations
- Suppression filtering with real database
- Provider integration
